commands.repair_reason: This maintainer-labeled auth-lock PR needs contributor or maintainer revision for the P1 race plus real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime proof.; Needs attention: The diff changes auth-profile lock reclamation and can weaken credential-store write exclusion under contention.; Review finding: [P1] Bind stale-lock deletion to the inspected file — src/infra/stale-lock-file.ts:80-81 (sha=0aa0d0fea635533319638605d2172f86fce250f2)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a stale-lock helper, changes plugin SDK file locking to remove dead-owner stale locks and retry acquisition, adds PID/zombie tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. A stale auth-profiles.json.lock can reach fs-safe's file_lock_stale path, and the PR then attempts wrapper-level recovery; I did not execute it in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This maintainer-labeled auth-lock PR needs contributor or maintainer revision for the P1 race plus real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime proof.
